benefits.description: Strong appetite suppression, unable to eat normal amounts
Wife reports user is full of energy for 5 days after injection

side_effects.description: Extreme appetite suppression, feels full/overeaten sensation, difficulty forcing food intake, reports feeling like needing to purge after eating
Nausea and aversion to food, ate small burger and wanted to vomit

protocol_notes: Started 2023-01-13. Using 30mg bottle reconstituted with bacteriostatic water. On concurrent TRT. Only consuming approximately 500 calories daily (2 cans tuna, 1 salad, 1 scoop protein powder). Drinking 2/3 gallon of 6-star ultimate hydration water per 12 hours. Height 6 feet, starting weight 325 lbs. Concerned about weight loss plateau after 2 days without scale movement. User has medium-to-small frame despite prior assumption of large frame.
